title: Hurukai - Get All Artifacts
content:
Build a global archive with:
- MFT (Windows)
- Hives (Windows)
- USN logs (Windows)
- Prefetch files (Windows)
- EVT/EVTX files (Windows)
- Log files (Linux)
- Filesystem content (Linux)

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the HarfangLab pack (HarfangLabEDR, partner-supported).

Inputs — agentid.

Integrations/scripts used: Hurukai.
